concepts.name: Pending-confirmation predicate: single export, no inline re-derivation
concepts.note: isPendingConfirmation (contacts.ts) confirmed by Stage-1 review + 3 independent examiners: single export site, no second inline pendingConfirmationSince check, not folded into isAllowedDmSenderComposite/isAllowedDmSender/isBlockedPeer. S2's two future call sites (directMessageNotifications.ts bell gate, ContactChat.tsx-adjacent render gate) MUST import this function, never re-derive.

concepts.name: Re-pairing preserves an existing pendingConfirmationSince value (never resets it, never clears it)
concepts.note: Confirmed via rememberPendingContact's spread-preserving re-pairing branch; both previously-null and previously-pending cases directly tested.

concepts.name: rememberPendingContact, confirmContact, and isPendingConfirmation all resolve pubkeyHex case-insensitively against ALL matching stored keys (not first-match), mirroring addContactByNpub's matchingKeys pattern
concepts.note: Landed after two remediation rounds (Stage-1 review + Codex both caught first-match .find() bugs at different call sites — write-side then read-side). Any future function touching pendingConfirmationSince must follow the same plural-match discipline.

concepts.name: Bell increment (incrementDirectMessage) is gated on the pending-confirmation predicate at both kind4Handler and kind1059Handler call sites
concepts.note: Confirmed at directMessageNotifications.ts:98,146; rememberContact still fires unconditionally, only incrementDirectMessage is gated.

concepts.name: chatPersistence.ts#loadMessages has a one-time-per-thread-per-session self-heal side effect (marks thread healed, returns refetchIds only on the FIRST call); any reconciliation/count-only caller must use a raw idb-keyval read instead, never loadMessages, or it will permanently starve the thread's one real repair opportunity from ContactChat's own later call
concepts.note: Discovered via Codex review across three rounds: first at initDirectMessageCounts (startup batch scan), then at reconcileConfirmedContactDirectMessageCount (both list- and detail-confirm paths). Both were fixed to use raw idb-keyval reads. Any future function reading persisted DM history for counting/reconciliation purposes only (not for rendering) must follow this same discipline.

concepts.name: initDirectMessageCounts (batch/startup) and reconcileConfirmedContactDirectMessageCount (single-peer, confirm-time) are the two sanctioned recompute-from-persisted-history entrypoints; both use raw idb-keyval reads, never chatPersistence.ts#loadMessages; callers must not hand-duplicate the count logic
concepts.note: Amended from the original single-entrypoint framing: S2 added a second, single-peer entrypoint (reconcileConfirmedContactDirectMessageCount) rather than overloading the batch one, specifically to keep the self-heal-avoidance fix isolated per call shape.

concepts.name: Blocked always wins over pending in ContactDetailView's three-way branch (already_member > blocked > pending_confirmation > selectable/normal)
concepts.note: Confirmed at contacts.tsx: isArchived branch checked before isPendingConfirmation branch; e2e-verified for the both-blocked-and-pending case.

concepts.name: Every new pending-confirmation user-facing string has both en and de entries in i18n.ts's Copy type; no hardcoded strings in contacts.tsx or its components
concepts.note: Includes the InviteMemberModal 'pending_confirmation' reason label added during gate-remediation, not just the original four badge/prompt/button keys.

concepts.name: A live incrementDirectMessage bump for a peer currently being reconciled (reconcileConfirmedContactDirectMessageCount) must never be reduced by the reconcile's recompute — the final count floors at whichever is higher
concepts.note: reconcileFloor/noteLiveIncrementFloor mechanism, added in gate-remediation after Codex flagged a narrow async race. Scoped to this file only; does not change the shared reconcileInit helper's behavior for its other callers.
